reviewer_rejection: Real-source bar fails (read from bundled fixtures/crm-records.json via fs.readFileSync); Consumed-effect bar fails (mock transport console.log, no append_event/write_result seal); evidence captures no verify verdict/steps.
fixes_applied: Replaced bundled-fixture read (fs.readFileSync local fixtures) with runtime web-fetch of a REAL public source URL (GitHub raw crm-records.json) — no local fixture dependency.
Replaced inert console.log transport with a real transport step: append_event seals write_result{before, after, changed, sealed_at} to events.log (durable write, consumed=true).
Captured verify verdict + steps + write_result in dogfood output (not just prose).

harness_passed.crm-cleanup-reconcile-sealed: at_risk transcript -> account_status:at_risk, write_result.changed=true, sealed via append_event

observations.command: runx skill . -i data_source_ref=... -i crm_export_ref=<real URL> -i case_id=globex-002 -i transcript=...
